mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_schedule(task_id, user_id, post_id, content_data, schedule_time, status, retry_count, idempotent_token, is_canceled, last_error, alarm_sent) VALUES(#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{postId}, #{contentData}, #{scheduleTime}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{idempotentToken}, #{isCanceled}, #{lastError}, #{alarmSent})
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, user_id, post_id, content_data, schedule_time, status, retry_count, idempotent_token, is_canceled, last_error, alarm_sent FROM content_schedule WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 0 AND (is_canceled IS NULL OR is_canceled = 0) ORDER BY schedule_time ASC LIMIT 1
